description: Style note This kurta by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look Product detailsBrown kurta with a round neck and split neckline, stiched green and pink floral artwork on the yoke, short sleeves, split side seams Material and careBlended fabricDry clean only Size and Fit Regular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
